title: Set of 6 Jumbo Tower Bolts - 6" Door Lock Bracket, Household DIY | Fixing with Screws, 6 Inch, Doors Bolt Fittings Latches | Strong & Durable Multi Use, Secure Household
features: PREMIUM QUALITY - This door lock bolt has a length of about 6 inches (150 mm). Manufactured Using Quality Steel With A Black Powder-Coated Finish. This deadbolt works with padlocks and is excellent for use as an internal door lock and garden gate lock.

MODERN DESIGN - This Uses A Modern Design To Secure Doors And Gates. Our Steel Door Bolt Lock Is The Perfect Design For A Garden Door Lock Or As A Front Door Bolt. It Will Easily Blend With Any Interior Decor.

HEAVY DUTY - Our sliding bolt lock is constructed from heavy-duty steel and features a BZP zinc plating finish, ensuring its durability. This garden gate bolt is galvanized to withstand the elements and resist rust, ensuring it lasts for many years.

EASY TO INSTALL - These Door Bolts For Doors Come With All Necessary Screws. Simply Measure The Black Gate Bolt Against The Surface, Drill Out Your Holes, Then Screw It In Tightly. It May Be Installed In A Variety Of Different Orientations.

MULTI PURPOSE - The Sliding Bolt Is Used For Securing Doors And Gates In Buildings, Fences, Vans, Trucks, Trailer Ramps, Furniture Etc. So The Black Bolts Are Secured And Remain Closed When Required. This Bolt For Gate Is Suitable For Locking Doors, Gates, Chests, Cabinets And Many Other Objects.
description: SET OF 6 JUMBO TOWER BOLT DOOR LOCK BRACKET HOUSEHOLD DIY FIXING WITH SCREWS 6"
